summary: A good‑to‑excellent matrix recording captures a hot first set and an unusually varied second set highlighted by the rare Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstances sequence and the only Shakedown > Playing > Terrapin run.
review: The tape offers clear audience capture on the opening half and pristine soundboard quality once the band moves into the second set, making it a worthwhile listen. Musically the show shines with a scorching first set, a uniquely varied second set featuring rare song pairings, and only a slightly rushed finish after Stella Blue.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong musical praise (hot first set, unique second‑set combos) combined with mostly positive remarks about the recording quality yields a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set recorded from the audience – clear enough for most listeners; second set switches to a clean soundboard source with crisp mastering. Overall listenable with no major drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as "hot"; second set opens like wine with air, offering varied and well‑performed transitions. The concert ends a bit rushed after Stella Blue but the overall pacing is praised.
